security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: cardimg: http://cardimg.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Flesh and Blood collection & deck manager
bundle.longDescription: A local-first collection and deck manager for the Flesh and Blood TCG: browse the card catalog, organise your collection into binders, build and validate decks, and import/export decklists. Unofficial fan tool; card data © Legend Story Studios.
bundle.copyright: © 2026 Patrick Lipka. Flesh and Blood is © Legend Story Studios.
